title: UPPSC LT Grade Computer Science Exam Quiz
description: Comprehensive practice questions derived from the UPPSC LT Computer Science paper including C, OOPs, DBMS, and OS.
heading: Computer Science Practice Questions

questions.question: What will be the output of the following 'C' code on a 64-bit computer? #include <stdio.h> Union sti {int x; char y;}; int main () {Union sti s; Printf("%d", sizeof (s)); return 0; }

Consider the following statements with reference to Batch Processing Systems: 1. They are non-interactive system. 2. Multiple jobs are submitted and executed sequentially.
Assertion (A): Object Oriented Programming follows bottom-up approach. Reason (R): Most of the design work is done at the beginning of software development of object oriented methodology.
options: Both (A) and (R) are true but (R) is not the correct explanation of (A)
Both (A) and (R) are true and (R) is the correct explanation of (A)
